productDisplayName: Mark Taylor Men Striped Navy Blue Trousers
description: Composition Navy blue striped trousers made of polyester viscose blended fabric, has a flat front, two side pockets, two back pockets with loop and button closures, comfortable waistband with belt loops and a zipper and button closure Fit Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash Do not bleach or wring by hand Dry in shade Warm iron Take formal dressing to the next level with this pair of trousers from mark taylor. The fall of the fabric gives a slim shape while offering all day comfort. Pair it with crisp formal shirt, a blazer, stylish cufflinks and leather shoes. Model statistics The product is a size 32 on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
